response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance as 'SPARKS' by Takanashi Kiara from early on-screen text. 2. Performed a web search for 'Takanashi Kiara SPARKS lyrics'. 3. Confirmed Takanashi Kiara is both the performer and original artist. 4. Verified the song duration, which spans the first ~4 minutes. 5. Mapped the remaining time to an interaction/talk segment. 6. Structured the data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A concert performance of the song 'SPARKS' by VTuber Takanashi Kiara, followed by an audience interaction/talk segment.

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'SPARKS' by Takanashi Kiara with choreography and stage lighting.
